gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently, smiles widely, and gestures with both arms as they introduce the topic of shapes
a person leans slightly forward, tilts their head and opens their arms invitingly while asking about shapes
a tutor lifts both hands, palms open, and moves gracefully from side to side while showcasing the circle, square, and triangle
a person raises one hand and points to an imaginary square while counting to four, emphasizing the sides and vertices
a tutor moves closer to the visual display, gestures to a triangle and a square, inviting the class to compare them
a person holds their hands together thoughtfully, nods gently, and encourages students to reflect on the shapes' attributes
a tutor spreads their arms wide, smiles broadly, and celebrates the students' learning about 2D shapes together
a person points upward with one hand and playfully lifts the other arm, as if encouraging students to look for shapes around them
